app.name: CMMS Web
app.tagline: Production web foundation for church operations.
app.description: Church Management and Coordination System for browser teams.

shell.pendingMembersSummary: Review and approve new ministry member signups.
shell.myContributionsSummary: Your personal contribution history and obligations.
shell.memberSummary: Assignments, attendance, notifications, and contribution progress.
shell.leaderSummary: Operations, attendance trends, ministry analytics, and reliability signals.
shell.adminSummary: System health, audit activity, and sync diagnostics for platform oversight.
shell.eventsSummary: Calendar planning, recurring events, assignments, and conflict checks.
shell.attendanceSummary: Operational attendance marking, excuses, escalations, and reliability scoring.
shell.coverageSummary: Swaps, replacements, service readiness, fairness, and operational continuity.
shell.operationalSummary: Permission-scoped operational home for protocol and choir governance leaders.
shell.governanceSummary: Assign committee roles and scoped governance permissions to members.
shell.financeSummary: Ministry-scoped contributions, budgets, and stewardship analytics.

myContributions.title: My contributions
myContributions.subtitle: A personal view of your participation and obligations. This space is for clarity and encouragement — not judgment.
myContributions.loadError: We could not load your contribution history.
myContributions.emptyMessage: When your ministry records contributions or dues, they will appear here with full transparency.
myContributions.upToDateTitle: You are fully up to date
myContributions.upToDateMessage: Thank you for your faithful participation in ministry stewardship.
myContributions.consistencyHint: How consistently your recorded obligations are settled.
myContributions.ministryHint: Only ministries where you have recorded activity.
myContributions.remindersHint: Outstanding or partial obligations — please reach out to your treasurer if you need support.

financeStewardship.title: Finance stewardship
financeStewardship.subtitle: Ministry-scoped contributions and budgets. Visibility follows your committee permissions.
financeStewardship.unauthorized: You do not have finance stewardship access.
financeStewardship.recentTransactionsHint: Approved ministry transactions in your scope.
financeStewardship.noTransactionsHint: Ministry transactions will appear here once recorded.
financeStewardship.noOutstandingHint: All tracked members are current on their obligations.
financeStewardship.pendingApprovalsHint: Review expenses before they affect ministry balances.
financeStewardship.noPendingApprovalsHint: New expenses requiring your review will appear here.
financeStewardship.noBudgetsHint: Budget plans for this ministry will appear once leaders define them.

governanceAdmin.title: Committee governance
governanceAdmin.subtitle: Assign protocol and choir committee roles. Permissions take effect on next login.
governanceAdmin.assignDescription: Select a member and committee role. Existing assignments for the same role are updated.
governanceAdmin.assignValidation: Select both a member and a role.
governanceAdmin.rolesDescription: Roles defined for this ministry scope (from seed or admin configuration).
governanceAdmin.assignmentsDescription: Active committee members and their governance roles.
governanceAdmin.noAssignments: Assign members to committee roles to enable scoped governance.
governanceAdmin.emptyRolesDescription: Seed or configure roles for this ministry before assigning members.

operational.title: Operational center
operational.subtitle: Executive summary for {role} authority. Open attendance or coverage for operational detail.
operational.unauthorized: You do not have operational governance permissions.
operational.detailHint: Mark attendance, resolve escalations, and manage coverage from dedicated workspaces.
operational.choirSummaryHint: Choir attendance and roster tools live in the attendance workspace.
operational.choirUseAttendance: Use the attendance workspace for choir service marking and summaries.

events.title: Event engine
events.subtitle: Schedule events, manage recurrence, and run assignment workflows.
events.loadFailed: Unable to load events right now.
events.saveFailed: Unable to save event right now.
events.noPoolCandidates: No candidates available in rotation pool.
events.conflictDetected: Conflict detected with "{title}" at overlapping time.

assignments.title: Assignments - {event}
assignments.memberPlaceholder: Paste member id or pick from pool
assignments.poolSubtitle: Use choir rotation candidates to fill quotas quickly.
assignments.noPool: No rotation pool candidates available for this event.
assignments.noPoolDescription: Schedule a choir rotation or assign members manually by ID.

attendance.title: Attendance governance
attendance.subtitle: Mark operational attendance, review excuses, escalate risks, and monitor reliability.
attendance.markFailed: Unable to save attendance right now.

markingFlow.sectionHint: Choose a flow — mark today, review excuses, or browse member history.
markingFlow.noExcusedDescription: Excused absences awaiting review will appear here.
markingFlow.noHistoryDescription: Open the Today tab, choose an event, then tap a member name to view history.

eventPicker.title: Upcoming events
eventPicker.subtitle: Select a service or rehearsal to mark attendance for assigned members.
eventPicker.empty: No upcoming events in the next 30 days.

roster.title: Assigned roster
roster.subtitleIdle: Choose an event to load the roster.
roster.selectEvent: Select an event from the list to load the assigned roster.
roster.empty: No members assigned to this event yet.

excuseReview.title: Excuse review
excuseReview.subtitle: Approve or reject excused absences and escalate unresolved cases.

markDialog.evidenceHint: Optional link to a document or message for pastoral review.
markDialog.replacementConfirm: Confirm that this member served as a replacement for this event.
markDialog.voluntaryConfirm: Confirm voluntary extra service — this does not count as an official assignment.

escalationDialog.title: Escalate absence — {member}
escalationDialog.description: Route this case to a higher oversight level when local review is insufficient.
escalationDialog.notesHint: Optional context for the receiving leader.
escalationDialog.failed: Unable to escalate this case right now.

excuseActionDialog.approveHint: This confirms the excused absence is acceptable for operational records.
excuseActionDialog.failed: Unable to complete review right now.

memberHistory.title: Member attendance history
memberHistory.subtitle: Operational reliability, lateness, and voluntary service.

choir.title: Choir attendance
choir.subtitle: Rehearsal and service attendance for choir ministry.

discipline.title: Discipline review recommendations
discipline.subtitle: Pastoral review suggested — not automatic discipline.
discipline.createFailed: Unable to create discipline case right now.
discipline.emptyDescription: Reliability scoring has not flagged any members for pastoral review.

weights.title: Attendance scoring weights
weights.subtitle: Configure weighted reliability scoring for operational statuses.
weights.saveFailed: Unable to save weights right now.

teamHead.title: Team head dashboard
teamHead.empty: No pending attendance risks for your teams.
teamHead.emptyDescription: When absences or escalations need your attention, they will appear here.
teamHead.noTeamsDescription: Protocol teams for your oversight scope will appear once generated.

coordinator.title: Coordinator dashboard
coordinator.empty: No operational attendance risks right now.
coordinator.emptyDescription: Escalations and pending absences across teams will surface here.

president.title: President dashboard
president.emptyDescription: Ministry-wide escalations and unresolved absences appear here.
president.noTrendDescription: Attendance trends will populate after several months of marking.

coverage.title: Coverage management
coverage.subtitle: Swaps, replacements, service readiness, and operational continuity.
coverage.actionFailed: Unable to complete that action right now.

analytics.title: Coverage analytics
analytics.subtitle: Operational continuity signals for the ministry.

swaps.title: Swap requests
swaps.subtitle: Mutual swaps and assignment exchanges awaiting resolution.
swaps.emptyDescription: When members request assignment swaps, they will appear here for review.

replacements.title: Replacement requests
replacements.subtitle: Voluntary, official, and emergency coverage workflows.
replacements.emptyDescription: Replacement coverage requests will appear here when members need cover.

teamHead.title: Team head coverage dashboard
teamHead.empty: No pending coverage issues for your teams.
teamHead.emptyDescription: Swaps and replacements needing team-head review will appear here.

coordinator.title: Coordinator coverage dashboard
coordinator.emptyDescription: Escalated swaps, replacements, and staffing risks surface here.

fairness.title: Fairness alerts
fairness.subtitle: Overload, dependency, and assignment imbalance signals.
fairness.emptyDescription: Assignment balance looks healthy across the ministry roster.

dialogs.escalateDescription: Route this coverage case to a higher oversight level.
dialogs.notesHint: Optional context for audit and pastoral review.

foundation.title: Web foundation is ready for production sprints.
foundation.description: This workspace establishes Next.js, localization, environment validation, theme support, API connectivity, shared providers, and guarded browser routes.
foundation.apiUnreachable: Unable to reach the backend API.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Sign in to your church ministry platform to view schedules, attendance, and ministry updates.
auth.hint: New members can register and wait for leader approval before full access is granted.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: We will help you recover access soon.
auth.forgotPasswordPlaceholder: Password reset by email is coming in a later release. Please contact your ministry leader if you need help signing in.

signup.pageSubtitle: Tell us who you are and which ministry you serve. A leader will review your request before you receive full access.
signup.cardSubtitle: A calm, guided signup for choir and protocol members.
signup.phoneOptional: Optional — helps leaders reach you if needed.
signup.ministryChoirDescription: Choir members serve in worship through singing, rehearsals, and scheduled services.
signup.ministryProtocolDescription: Protocol members welcome, guide, and coordinate hospitality during church services.
signup.ministryBothDescription: You participate in both choir and protocol ministries.
signup.approvalExplanation: After you submit, your registration will be reviewed by a ministry leader. You can sign in to check your status, but operational tools unlock once you are approved.

pending.title: Your request is being reviewed
pending.body: Your ministry registration has been received. Leaders are reviewing your request so you can join the platform with the right access.
pending.stepReview: A ministry leader will review your details.
pending.stepNotify: You will receive a notification when a decision is made.
pending.stepAccess: Once approved, you can view schedules, attendance, and ministry updates.
pending.helpHint: If you need help, contact your choir or protocol leader.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.welcomeChoirMember: Welcome to the choir ministry platform. Your leaders will assign upcoming responsibilities and rehearsals.
welcome.welcomeProtocolMember: Welcome to the protocol ministry platform. Your leaders will share service assignments and coordination updates.
welcome.welcomeBothMember: Welcome. You serve in both choir and protocol — your leaders will guide you through upcoming responsibilities.
welcome.welcomeChoirLeader: Welcome back. You can review choir operations, attendance, and ministry updates from here.
welcome.welcomeProtocolLeader: Welcome back. You can review protocol operations, coverage, and ministry updates from here.
welcome.welcomeCommittee: Welcome. Your committee tools and ministry insights are ready when you need them.
welcome.welcomeSuperAdmin: Welcome. System administration tools are available from your dashboard.
welcome.nextSteps: Start with your dashboard overview. Advanced panels will appear as your responsibilities grow.

pending.title: Pending registrations
pending.subtitle: Review new ministry members before granting full platform access.
pending.name: Name
pending.emptyDescription: New signup requests will appear here for review.

dashboard.title: Protected dashboard foundation
dashboard.subtitle: This page is guarded and ready for Sprint 3 widgets.
dashboard.memberExcuseDescription: Submit an excuse request for an upcoming assignment. A leader will review it.
dashboard.memberExcuseFailed: Unable to submit excuse request right now.
dashboard.overviewSectionHint: What needs your attention right now.
dashboard.dashboardLoadError: Unable to load dashboard data right now.
dashboard.adminSubtitle: This route proves role guards before wider dashboard work begins.
dashboard.leaderUpcomingEventsHint: Scheduled activities in the next 7 days.
dashboard.leaderAttendanceHint: Weighted operational reliability for the current month.
dashboard.attendanceTrendDescription: Recent attendance movement across the last six months.
dashboard.upcomingEventsCardDescription: The next scheduled services and ministry commitments.
dashboard.noUpcomingEvents: No upcoming events are scheduled yet.
dashboard.reliabilityDescription: Attendance-based confidence bands for member follow-up.
dashboard.financeCardDescription: A quick read on finance and sync workload.
dashboard.auditCardDescription: Latest actions recorded across the platform.
dashboard.noAuditActivity: No audit activity is available yet.
dashboard.memberUpcomingAssignmentsHint: Scheduled assignments still ahead of you.
dashboard.memberPendingSwapsHint: Swap requests that still need follow-up.
dashboard.scheduleCardDescription: Your next assignments and service moments.
dashboard.noSchedule: No upcoming schedule is assigned right now.
dashboard.notificationsDescription: Latest operational notices sent to your account.
dashboard.attendanceCardDescription: Latest attendance records captured for your profile.
dashboard.noAttendanceHistory: No attendance history is available yet.
dashboard.contributionDescription: Track dues completion and recent contribution periods.
dashboard.contributionUpToDate: You are fully up to date — thank you for your faithful participation.
dashboard.noContributionData: No contribution data is available yet.
dashboard.systemUsersHint: User accounts provisioned in the platform.
dashboard.systemEventsHint: Events currently stored in the system.
dashboard.systemAuditHint: Audit log entries captured so far.
dashboard.systemHealthDescription: Current platform status based on conflicts and audit freshness.
dashboard.roleDistributionDescription: Assigned users across the current role matrix.
dashboard.auditTrendDescription: Operational activity volume over the last six months.
dashboard.syncDiagnosticsDescription: Recent conflicts that may block clean system state.
dashboard.noSyncConflicts: No sync conflicts are open right now.

alerts.title: Operational alerts
alerts.description: Actionable issues needing attention — prioritized by urgency.

intelligence.title: Ministry intelligence
intelligence.description: Operational KPIs by ministry scope — attendance, readiness, and trends.

committee.treasurerDescription: Contribution compliance, unpaid balances, and financial trends.
committee.disciplineDescription: Pastoral review indicators — support-focused, not punitive.
committee.secretaryDescription: Communications, events, and ministry records overview.
committee.operationsDescription: Concerts, projects, choir development, and operational planning.
committee.coordinatorDescription: Team readiness, escalations, overload alerts, and staffing balance.
committee.presidentDescription: Executive ministry intelligence — strategic indicators, not operational clutter.
committee.choirLeaderDescription: Choir attendance, rehearsal participation, and participation trends.

governance.teamReliabilityDescription: Choir-compatibility coverage across active protocol teams.
governance.replacementMixDescription: Official vs voluntary replacement activity by month.
governance.roleWidgetsDescription: Dashboard sections enabled by active governance claims.
governance.memberHistoryDescription: Your recent protocol service team participation.
governance.memberAccessDescription: Capabilities available in your current scope.
governance.choirCompatibilityDescription: Percent of protocol team assignments aligned with choir compatibility preference.
governance.adminAccessDescription: Operational governance controls enabled for this account.

common.unauthorized: You do not have access to this area.
